author: John of Avranches (†1079)
title: De officiis ecclesiasticis
editions: R. Delamare, ed., Le ‘De officiis ecclesiasticis” de Jean d’Avranches, archevéque de Rouen (1067-1079), Bibliotheque liturgique du Chanoine U. Chevalier 22 (Paris 1923).
remarks: See Richard Allen, A Proud and Headstrong Man.
